invariants.name: Life clamped 0-100
invariants.details: _apply_life_delta() uses clampi(current + delta, 0, LIFE_ESSENCE_MAX). _damage_life() uses maxi(old-amount, 0). _heal_life() uses mini(old+amount, MAX). All 3 paths correctly enforce the 0-100 range.

invariants.name: Faction rep delta capped ±20/card
invariants.details: _apply_faction_reputation() enforces clampi(delta, -20, 20) at line 609. scale_and_cap() also applies ADD_REPUTATION cap. Double enforcement is safe.

invariants.name: Faction score stays 0-100
invariants.details: clampi(current + capped_delta, FACTION_SCORE_MIN, FACTION_SCORE_MAX) = clampi(x, 0, 100). FACTION_SCORE_START=20 (neutral on run 1).

invariants.name: MOS soft_min=8, target=20-25, soft_max=40, hard_max=50
invariants.details: MOS_CONVERGENCE dict confirmed: soft_min_cards=8, target_cards_min=20, target_cards_max=25, soft_max_cards=40, hard_max_cards=50. StoreRun.check_run_end() enforces hard_max end. Card system check_run_end() also enforces hard_max via card_index.

invariants.name: Death check AFTER effects
invariants.details: process_card() pipeline: Step 7 (effects) → Step 8 (protection+pacing) → Step 9 (death check). StoreRun.check_run_end() is called AFTER resolve_choice() in the store RESOLVE_CHOICE handler.

invariants.name: Drain -1/carte not applied in active main flow
invariants.details: Active main flow: controller → store.cards.resolve_card() → store.dispatch(RESOLVE_CHOICE) → StoreRun.resolve_choice(). NO drain applied in this path. Director decision q-001 'Aucun drain de vie à chaque carte' is effectively respected. NOTE: LIFE_ESSENCE_DRAIN_PER_CARD constant still set to 1 and orphaned process_card() still contains drain logic — technical debt.
invariants.director_override: q-20260412-001: Aucun drain de vie à chaque carte

invariants.name: Pacing recovery +5 HP if life < 20
invariants.details: process_card() step 8.5: if life_post_effects > 0 and life_post_effects < 20 → _apply_life_delta(state, 5). Safety net prevents cheap one-shot deaths. NOTE: this is in orphaned process_card() — not confirmed active in main flow.

invariants.name: Promise deadlines tracked correctly
invariants.details: ADD_PROMISE stores made_at_card=cards_played. Deadline check: cards_played - made_at >= deadline. process_card() step 10 and StoreRun.check_promise_deadlines() both track correctly.

invariants.name: Multiplier scaling applied correctly
invariants.details: MerlinEffectEngine.scale_and_cap() + get_multiplier(score) used in both MerlinCardSystem.resolve_card() and process_card() pipeline. ADD_REPUTATION specifically scales args[1] (amount) not args[0] (faction). Correct.

invariants.name: Mercy damage reduction at 3+ consecutive deaths
invariants.details: process_card() step 7: if DAMAGE_LIFE and consecutive_deaths >= 3, scaled_amount *= 0.8. NOTE: in orphaned process_card().

invariants.name: cards_played counter accurate
invariants.details: DOUBLE INCREMENT BUG: MerlinCardSystem.resolve_card() modifies run_state['cards_played'] += 1 where run_state IS a reference to store.state['run'] (GDScript 4 dicts are reference types). Then StoreRun.resolve_choice() ALSO increments state['run']['cards_played'] += 1. Result: 2 increments per card played. MOS hard_max of 50 triggers at ~25 real cards.

bugs.title: Double increment cards_played per card
bugs.description: MerlinCardSystem.resolve_card() increments run_state['cards_played'] at line 483. Since run_state = store.state.get('run', {}) is a reference in GDScript 4, this directly mutates store.state['run']['cards_played']. Then StoreRun.resolve_choice() (called via store.dispatch RESOLVE_CHOICE) increments the same field again at line 146. Result: cards_played = 2× actual count. MOS hard_max (50 cards) triggers at ~25 real cards, cutting runs in half.
bugs.reproduction: Start a run. Play 25 cards. store.state['run']['cards_played'] will read 50. StoreRun.check_run_end() forces end.
bugs.fix: Remove the cards_played increment from MerlinCardSystem.resolve_card() (line 483). Keep only the StoreRun.resolve_choice() increment as the single source of truth. Also review card_index vs cards_played divergence.

bugs.title: process_card() is an orphaned 12-step pipeline never called in main flow
bugs.description: MerlinEffectEngine.process_card() (lines 71-256) implements the full 12-step bible pipeline including drain, protection, pacing, promises, cooldowns. However, NO caller invokes it in the main game path (controller → card_system.resolve_card → store.dispatch RESOLVE_CHOICE). The main flow misses: pacing recovery, mercy reduction, promise deadline countdown, cooldown tick per card. These should be wired into the active flow or the orphaned method should be removed.
bugs.fix: Either: (a) Wire process_card() into main flow replacing resolve_card() logic, OR (b) Extract the still-relevant steps (pacing recovery, promises, cooldowns) into StoreRun.resolve_choice() and delete process_card(). Option (b) preferred to avoid complexity.

bugs.title: LIFE_ESSENCE_DRAIN_PER_CARD=1 contradicts director decision
bugs.description: Constant LIFE_ESSENCE_DRAIN_PER_CARD=1 with comment 'Base drain each card (survival pressure)' contradicts director feedback q-001: 'Aucun drain de vie à chaque carte'. The constant is referenced in the orphaned process_card() but not in the main flow. Should be set to 0 to formally honor director decision and prevent accidental re-introduction.
bugs.fix: Set LIFE_ESSENCE_DRAIN_PER_CARD to 0 in merlin_constants.gd and update comment.

bugs.title: card_index and cards_played are divergent trackers
bugs.description: MerlinCardSystem.resolve_card() increments run_state['card_index'] (line 482) for its own check_run_end(). StoreRun.check_run_end() uses run['cards_played'] (line 213). card_index is only in run_state (passed by reference to card_system), while cards_played is in the authoritative state. With the double-increment fix for cards_played, card_index will become the only non-duplicated tracker but it is not used by the store. Consolidate to a single counter.
bugs.fix: After fixing BUG-CRITICAL-001: remove card_index from MerlinCardSystem or alias it to cards_played. Use only cards_played as the canonical run position counter.

simulated_runs.result: Run forcibly ended by MOS hard_max (cards_played=50 at 25 real cards due to BUG-CRITICAL-001)
check_run_end returns ended=true at cards_played>=50 (store) and card_index>=50 (card_system)
simulated_runs.note: Both MOS checkers fire at 50, but BUG-CRITICAL-001 means this triggers at 25 real cards

simulated_runs.scenario: Faction scores all at 100, apply +20 rep
Faction scores all at 0, apply -20 rep
Victory condition at 25+ cards + mission complete
simulated_runs.result: Victory correctly triggered (cards_played >= MIN_CARDS_FOR_VICTORY=25 and mission complete)
simulated_runs.note: With BUG-CRITICAL-001, this triggers at ~12-13 real cards (25 plays = 12-13 real)

simulated_runs.scenario: MOS zone tracking at various card counts
simulated_runs.result: All zone thresholds correct per MOS_CONVERGENCE constants.

new_tasks_created.title: FIX CRITICAL: Supprimer double increment cards_played dans resolve_card()
new_tasks_created.description: MerlinCardSystem.resolve_card() ligne 483 incrémente run_state['cards_played'] ET store_run.gd ligne 146 incrémente encore. Double incrément. Fix: supprimer ligne 483 (cards_played += 1) et ligne 482 (card_index += 1 — doublon avec store). Garder uniquement l'incrément dans StoreRun.resolve_choice(). Vérifier aussi card_index vs cards_played divergence.

new_tasks_created.title: FIX HIGH: Supprimer process_card() orphelin ou l'intégrer au flow principal
new_tasks_created.description: MerlinEffectEngine.process_card() (lignes 71-256) est un pipeline 12-étapes jamais appelé dans le flow principal. Contient logique drain (orpheline), pacing recovery, mercy, promises countdown, cooldown decrement. Option préférée: supprimer process_card() entièrement, et ajouter les étapes manquantes pertinentes (pacing recovery +5 HP si life<20, promise deadline countdown) directement dans StoreRun.resolve_choice(). Le cooldown tick est déjà dans StoreRun.resolve_choice() via StoreOghams.tick_cooldowns().

s1_sprint_status.reason: BUG-CRITICAL-001 (double cards_played) breaks core loop — runs end at ~25 real cards instead of 50. Must fix before sprint can be considered stable.

recommendations: Immediately fix BUG-CRITICAL-001 (cards_played double increment) — this breaks the core run loop
Set LIFE_ESSENCE_DRAIN_PER_CARD=0 to formally honor director decision q-001
Delete or fully integrate orphaned process_card() pipeline
Consolidate card_index and cards_played into a single counter
Re-run this test after critical fix to verify 10 complete simulated runs pass
